nativeProps: NumberFieldProps with an explicit currency value contract

compositionPolicy.currency: The required normalized currency code is independent from the numeric value and is exposed as data-currency.
compositionPolicy.value: Values and hidden form data use canonical major units; the symbol, code, grouping, sign, and decimal text are display concerns.
compositionPolicy.negative: Negative values require allowNegative; accounting presentation remains a formatting choice rather than a different value model.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: showCanonicalPreview exposes the exact major-unit value beside its currency code, while statusRail=auto exposes localized bounds; both are independent and absent when disabled.
